title: apache2
html:
apache2

File Read

The first line may be leaked as an error message.

apache2 -f /path/to/input-file

The first line may be leaked as an error message.

apache2 -C 'Define APACHE_RUN_DIR /' -C 'Include /path/to/input-file'
